Q-Asker(이하 \"서비스\")를 이용해 주셔서 감사합니다. 본 약관: Thank you for using Q-Asker (hereinafter "the Service"). These terms govern the conditions of your use of the Service.
Q-Asker는 PDF, PPT, Word 파일을 업로드하면 AI가 자동: Q-Asker is a free web service that automatically generates quizzes using AI when you upload PDF, PPT, or Word files.
It supports various quiz types including multiple choice, true/false, and fill-in-the-blank.
회원가입 없이 이용 가능하며, 로그인 시 퀴즈 기록 저장 기능이 제공됩니: You can use the service without signing up. Logging in enables quiz history saving.
You must not use the Service for any illegal purposes.
You must not upload files that infringe on others' copyrights.
You must not engage in activities that disrupt the normal operation of the Service.
You must not access the Service or collect data through automated means.
Uploaded files are processed solely for the purpose of quiz generation.
Files are automatically deleted within 24 hours after processing.
Uploaded files are not used for commercial purposes or AI training.
파일의 저작권은 이용자에게 있으며, 서비스는 퀴즈 생성을 위한 일시적 이: Copyright of files remains with the user. The Service only holds a temporary license for quiz generation.

천재지변, 시스템 장애 등 불가항력으로 인한 서비스 중단에 대해 책임지지: We are not liable for service interruptions caused by force majeure, such as natural disasters or system failures.
AI가 생성한 퀴즈의 정확성을 보장하지 않습니다. 학습 보조 도구로 활용: We do not guarantee the accuracy of AI-generated quizzes. Please use them as a study aid.
We are not liable for any indirect or incidental damages arising from the use of the Service.
